sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-05-25 10:11
- Distance: 12 km
- Moving time: 1:08:40
- Elapsed time: 1:08:40
- Elevation gain: 99 m
- Average heart rate: 172.5 bpm
- Max heart rate: 189 bpm
- Average watts: 198.9 W
- Average speed: 10.5 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `174.2 bpm`, ranging from `146.8` to `186.1 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `166.2 bpm` and second-half average HR was `186.1 bpm` (+19.8 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `167.8 spm`, with a working range of `115.5` to `173.8 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `165.5 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `169.6 spm` (+4.1 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:43 /km` across `12.007 km` in `1:08:40` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:00 /km` and second-half pace was `5:26 /km` (-34 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `172.5 bpm` average and `189 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `163.1 bpm` in the first half and `184.5 bpm` in the second (+21.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:08:40` out of `1:08:40` elapsed (100.0%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `5` stop segments and `0.5%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `127.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.8 m` and `15.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `53.0 m` in the first half and `74.4 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
